description: Best-priced 4 bed, 3 bath townhouse in Eagle Ridge! Located in best location in the complex, this the sought-after Courtyards complex, this 1,796 sq ft, south-facing home is flooded with natural light. Bright living and dining areas and a functional kitchen. The lower level offers a bedroom with its own ensuite, ideal for guests or teens. Upstairs features an amazing primary bedroom with ensuite. Updated with a high-efficiency furnace and hot water tank + completely new PEX piping 2017, Exterior paint & gutters 2019! Large garage plus extra parking. Directly across from the playground - watch your kids play from the comfort of your home -and close to schools, shopping, transit, and recreation. Outstanding value - act fast!
